name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
notes: Edit this BB to define web servers.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Apache HTTP Server, Microsoft IIS, NGINX HTTP Server, Amazon AWS Route 53
